concerns.text: Constitution Principle I (Reproducibility) requires random seeds pinned in code/, but no task explicitly implements seed pinning or verification. T006 initializes requirements.txt but does not address seed configuration in code/.

Constitution Principle III (Data Hygiene) requires dataset checksums recorded under data/, but T001 only records version in data/README.md. No task generates or records checksums in state/ artifact_hashes map.
Constitution Principle II (Verified Accuracy) requires Reference-Validator Agent to verify all external citations, but no task explicitly implements this verification gate before Phase 1.
